tools.name: geometriesApi.fetchAdministrativeRegionsusingLatLng
tools.description: For given latitude and longitude, find intersecting administrative regions. Region polygons are simplified for web mapping.

tools.name: insightsApi.fetchAvailableInsights
tools.description: List all insights that the user has access to. This includes population, household income, crime statistics, walking traffic, vehicle traffic counts, employment, and much more,

tools.name: insightsApi.fetchInsightQueryParameters
tools.description: Fetch request/response structure metadata for a given Insight. This provides you the periods of data available as well as any other parameters you may want to query the Insight by. Example Insights include population and market data such as: age, daytime population, avg. home value, crime indexes, foot traffic, employment, income, occupation, etc.  For the full-list see the developer documentation.

tools.name: insightsApi.queryInsightatLocation
tools.description:
Execute a query for a given insight and location(s). Some Insights may require you to provide required options. ie., when querying `occupation` for White-Collar Workers, you can filter by opt=`{"data":{"category":[2469]}}`

For examples of `locations`, please see [Location API Documentation](https://idealspot.gitlab.io/developer-docs/#location)

tools.name: trafficCountApi.fetchNearestRoadSegments
tools.description: For given latitude and longitude, find `n` nearest road segments

tools.name: trafficCountApi.vehicleTrafficCountsforRoadSegment
tools.description: Time of day, day of week, and side of street vehicle traffic counts.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
